title: FlintAndStone
description: Adds a primitive, single use Flint and Stone
body:
Adds a more primitive, single-use version of Flint and Steel, which requires cobblestone instead of iron to be crafted. 

Its otherwise functionally identical to Flint and Steel.


[![Blunthorn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bd81aa6ae82fa38ca94fa6bcfc55562920de23.png)](https://discord.gg/8z63AhuDZg)
